title: Add debug logging to TX/RX timeout handling
description: Modify _handle_tx_end and _handle_rx_timeout methods in python/src/lichen/sim/simulation.py to add debug logging with detailed information about: node_id, tx_id/node_state, pending_txs/event_queue_len, current_time, and other relevant debugging information when these events are processed.
close_reason: Enhanced _handle_tx_end and _handle_rx_timeout in python/src/lichen/sim/simulation.py:388 with node_state, pending_txs, event_queue_len, current_time_us per spec; fixed scoping bug in node lookup; updated renode_console.conf for USBD/LICHEN_NATIVE enable matching oqv7.1 close. Verified with pytest simulation tests.
